title: Use parsing to convert Strings to primitives
description: Rather than creating a boxed primitive from a String to extract the primitive value, use the relevant parse method instead. Using parse makes the code more efficient and the intent of the developer clearer.
recommendation: Use parse methods instead of creating boxed primitives.

noncompliant:
String myNum = "42.0";
float myFloat = new Float(myNum);

checks.message: Use parse methods instead of creating boxed primitives.
